basic_details.job_title: Gurugram University Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 17 Posts
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSSSC CGL 12256 Group B & Group C Online Form 202612,256 Posts • Group B & Group C • SSC22 Jun 202612,256 postsRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Vacancies • Technician29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Openings • OSSSC13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsCentral Bank of India 4,500 Apprentice Recruitment 20264,500 Vacancies • Apprentice • Central Bank of India22 Jun 20264,500 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Openings • Conductor05 Jul 20264,318 posts

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 55 years Age relaxation is applicable as per rules. Specific relaxations include 5% for SC/ST/OBC (Non-creamy Layer)/PwBD (Haryana) and 5% for Ph.D. Degree holders (Master's Degree prior to 19 Sept, 1991).

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree with 55% marks and NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D.
qualification.details: Master's degree with 55% marks (or an equivalent grade) in a concerned/relevant/allied subject from an Indian University, or an equivalent degree from an accredited foreign University. Cleared National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by UGC or CSIR, or a similar test accredited by UGC like SLET/SET, OR awarded a Ph. D. Degree in accordance with UGC Regulations, 2009 or 2016. Candidates registered for Ph.D. prior to July 11, 2009 must fulfill specific conditions regarding regular mode, external evaluation, viva voce, publications, and presentations. Ph.D. obtained from a foreign University/Institution with a ranking among top 500 in World University Ranking (QS, THE, or ARWU) is also accepted.

salary_details.details: Consolidated fixed remuneration of Rs. 57700/- per month.

selection_process: Scrutiny of applications Written test (qualifying minimum 50% marks
47.5% for DSC/OSC/BC/PwBD) Shortlisting based on eligibility and written test performance Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Gurugram University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Gurugram University Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Gurugram University Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the scanned copy of the application form and documents via email is 25-06-2026. The hard copy of the application form must also reach by 25-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 17 vacancies announced for the Assistant Professor positions across various disciplines at Gurugram University.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum educational qualification required for Assistant Professor?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree with 55% marks in a relevant subject and have cleared NET/SLET/SET or hold a Ph.D. degree.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for the Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The application fee varies by category. General/OBC candidates need to pay Rs. 1000/-, while reserved categories of Haryana domicile have different fee structures, and PwBD applicants of Haryana are exempted.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for applicants is between 18 to 55 years. Age relaxations are applicable for certain categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated fixed remuneration of Rs. 57700/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the Gurugram University Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. A scanned copy of the filled application form and documents should be emailed to [email protected] by the last date.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any relaxation in the eligibility marks for certain candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, there is a 5% relaxation in eligibility marks for SC/ST/OBC (Non-creamy Layer)/PwBD candidates of Haryana, and also for Ph.D. degree holders who obtained their Master's degree before 19 Sept, 1991.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves scrutiny of applications, a qualifying written test, shortlisting based on performance, and an interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page, which will provide comprehensive details about the recruitment.
